ddls:
CREATE TABLE "client_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "yearmonth" TEXT /* Year and month of the transaction period */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to transaction_types */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to merchants */,
  "transaction_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to transaction_frequencies */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "fraud_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is potential fraud */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the transaction occurred */,
  "total_trx" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  "debit_trx" INTEGER /* Number of debit transactions */,
  "volume_debit_trx" REAL /* Total volume of debit transactions */,
  "credit_trx" INTEGER /* Number of credit transactions */,
  "volume_credit_trx" REAL /* Total volume of credit transactions */,
  "min_balance" REAL /* Minimum account balance during the period */,
  "max_balance" REAL /* Maximum account balance during the period */,
  "crg" INTEGER /* Credit risk group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_transactions_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_transactions_transaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_transactions_transaction_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_frequency_id") REFERENCES transaction_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_transactions_crg FOREIGN KEY ("crg") REFERENCES credit_risk_groups ("crg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "account_open_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client's account */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit assigned to the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the client */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "average_transaction_amount" REAL /* Average transaction amount */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  "total_transaction_volume" REAL /* Total transaction volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_risk_groups" (
  "crg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit risk group */,
  "crg_name" TEXT /* Name of the credit risk group */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk associated with the group */,
  "crg_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the credit risk group */,
  "crg_thresholds" TEXT /* Thresholds that define the risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "merchant_category" TEXT /* Category of the merchant */,
  "merchant_location" TEXT /* Location of the merchant */,
  "merchant_status" TEXT /* Status of the merchant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to client_transactions */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES client_transactions ("transaction_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each transaction record
Year and month of the transaction period
Flag indicating if the transaction is potential fraud
Minimum account balance during the period

Date when the account was opened
